title: Raghav Chadha news highlights: Rebel MP Sahney cites ‘crisis’ in Punjab as reason for merger with BJP
description: Raghav Chadha news highlights: A strong pushback of AAP workers against rebel Rajya Sabha MPs was seen in parts of Punjab on Saturday with the word ‘Gaddar’ spray-painted in several parts, including outside Harbhajan Singh's residence in Jalandhar.
